name: porter
description: Private local AI + Finder-like file bridge across your Macs — no cloud, no paid servers

scripts.build: npm run build -w @porter/protocol && npm run build -w @porter/core && npm run build -w @porter/desktop
scripts.dev: npm run build -w @porter/protocol && npm run dev -w @porter/core
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @porter/protocol && npm run typecheck -w @porter/core
